description: A driver reports a minor, non-injury accident. A safety manager must log the incident and begin the investigation process.

nodes.task_description: Receive a call from a driver reporting an incident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers initial details: driver, location, and a brief description.

nodes.task_description: Create a new safety incident report in the system.

expected_outcome.value: A new incident record is created with a unique ID.

nodes.task_description: Request photos of the damage from the driver and upload them to the incident report.

expected_outcome.value: Photos are successfully attached to the report.

nodes.task_description: Assign the incident to a claims adjuster for follow-up.

expected_outcome.value: The report is assigned to the correct person for investigation.
